svg.title: Ticket agent pipeline — single ticket lifecycle
svg.desc: Flowchart showing a single ticket moving through triage, routing, a decision branch to auto-resolve or escalate, human review, feedback loop back into RAG, and final closure.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does an incoming ticket look like in the system?')
sendPrompt('What structured output does the triage agent produce?')
sendPrompt('How does the router agent score auto-resolvability?')
sendPrompt('What tools does the resolver agent use to answer a ticket?')
sendPrompt('What briefing does the escalation agent write for the human?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a ticket is auto-resolved?')
sendPrompt('What does the human agent see in the review dashboard?')
sendPrompt('What is logged when a human resolves a ticket?')
sendPrompt('How does the feedback loop improve the RAG knowledge base over time?')
sendPrompt('What does LangSmith trace in the ticket system?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in the RAG knowledge base for ticket resolution?')
g.text: Past resolved tickets · docs · policies · pgvector
